## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Minimal reproducible example

```go
// Paste the smallest Go snippet that reproduces the issue.
// Include import paths where relevant.
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Paste the full error message or stack trace if available:

```
// error output here
```

## Environment

- SDK version: <!-- e.g. v0.2.0 — check go.mod or the release tag -->
- Go version: <!-- e.g. go1.24.0 — output of `go version` -->
- OS / arch: <!-- e.g. linux/amd64, darwin/arm64, windows/amd64 -->

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or references here.
